intro: Atropa belladonna, also known as deadly nightshade, is a highly toxic plant whose powder has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The powder, derived from the plant's dried leaves, stems, and roots, contains tropane alkaloids that can have hallucinogenic and sedative effects. However, due to its extremely high toxicity, handling atropa belladonna powder requires utmost caution and should only be done under the supervision of a trained professional.
